cases.description: Admitted execution-specs CODECOPY dynamic-offset benchmark variant copying 0 byte(s).
notes: Upstream intent: benchmark CODECOPY with gas-derived dynamic memory offsets while copying 0 byte(s).
RPC mapping: deploy a runtime that stores the evaluated dynamic offset in slot0x02, executes CODECOPY(offset, offset, size), and stores the result count and hash.
Admitted because the dynamically evaluated memory offset is stored in the runtime prior to execution, allowing dynamic hash expectation derivation.

cases.description: Admitted execution-specs CODECOPY fixed source/destination benchmark variant copying 0 byte(s).
notes: Upstream intent: benchmark CODECOPY with fixed source and destination offsets while copying 0 byte(s).
RPC mapping: deploy a deterministic runtime that executes CODECOPY(0, 0, size), stores the copied byte count in slot0, and stores KECCAK256 of the copied memory window in slot1.
Admitted because fixed source/destination removes the gas-derived byte-window branch and the copied byte count plus digest are deterministic final storage observables.

cases.description: Admitted execution-specs CODESIZE benchmark variant.
notes: Upstream intent: benchmark CODESIZE on the currently executing account.
Admitted because deployed runtime bytecode size is directly observable from the deployed contract code.

cases.description: Admitted execution-specs BALANCE cold-account benchmark variant against present target accounts.
notes: Upstream intent: benchmark BALANCE over cold present target accounts.
Admitted because target-account balance outcomes can be observed directly without copying account code or controlling block internals.

cases.description: Admitted execution-specs BALANCE cold-account benchmark variant against absent target accounts.
notes: Upstream intent: benchmark BALANCE over cold absent target accounts.
Admitted because target-account balance outcomes can be observed directly without copying account code or controlling block internals.

cases.description: Admitted execution-specs SELFBALANCE benchmark variant with zero contract balance.
notes: Upstream intent: benchmark SELFBALANCE on the currently executing account with zero balance.
Admitted because the executing contract balance is directly observable and can be asserted without block-environment control.

cases.description: Admitted execution-specs SELFBALANCE benchmark variant with non-zero contract balance.
notes: Upstream intent: benchmark SELFBALANCE on the currently executing account with a funded balance.
Admitted because the executing contract balance is directly observable and can be asserted without block-environment control.
